title: Hejaran family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hejaran family''' were a very wealthy noble family of [[House Mecetti]] who owned a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Pella]] called [[Nightsinger's Orb]] located in [[Mecetti Province]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. They were once considered great hunters and a popular family tradition was to hunt the [[nightsinger creature]].

==Family members==
*Baron [[Lucian Hejaran]], brother of Themion, cousin of Brigta, nephew of Galemus
*Lady [[Brigta Hejaran]], cousin of Lucian and Themion, niece of Galemus
*[[Themion Hejaran]], brother of Lucian, cousin of Brigta, nephew of Galemus
*[[Galemus Hejaran]], uncle of Lucian, Themion, and Brigta

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Blood Inheritance|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
